Off Calendar Sep-03-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
David Kleczek for Plaintiff.
Grace Harriett for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER GEIGER's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Request For Admissions, And Request For Production Of Documents is under submission. Counsel for Defendant to submit a proposed order tracking the tentative ruling in WORD format via email to jyjudgeprotem@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Jason Yurasek, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
